Reader.Name: Esha
Reader.Description: I specialise in all the Clairs & Mediumship. I will also clarify information with my Tarot & Oracle Cards, and have assistance from my guides. Please be open-minded with your readings, sometimes the information that is received may not necessarily be the one we are hoping to hear, however, have faith that it may be what is needed at this point in time. I am here to help support & guide you through your journey and questions. I look forward to speaking with you soon! Esha x

Reader.Name: Leonie
Reader.Description: I am a caring and experienced Clairvoyant Psychic and I discovered my gift from quite a young age. I was able to see and predict what was about to happen around them. I was able to help individuals on specific personal matters. I am here to guide you when you are feeling lifes challenges and will bring sunshine into your life. I specialise in love relationships and I am able to advise spiritually on career problems. I aim to empower and enlighten you, and my approach is honest and direct.

Reader.Name: Terry
Reader.Description: Healing Mind, Body, Spirit & the Emotions. I have been successfully predicting the outcome of many client issues now for over 40yrs. I am a Clairaudient, Clairsentient, Clairvoyant a Spirit Guide Channeler, and can read into Soulmate, Kindred Spirit, Twin Flame Connections, plus interaction or communicational issues etc. Reading in an ethical, honest and integral way is part of my core, and my aim is not to give you false promises, but the way forward in love matters. I reveal your past as it was, the present as it is and your future as it will be. I am also Internationally known, and pride myself on being a Psychic, Intuitive Channeler. I provide you with the answers to lifes most challenging love relationship questions, including, family, business, and friendship connections. Many times as we travel lifes path, we come to crossroads in love - where we wonder what do I do? What do I say?, What do I believe? Sometimes we need Spiritual Guidance. Are you trying to go forward in life but going backwards? Worried, confused or unhappy? My spirit guides provide the answers; they will always speak the truth and for your best outcome. If happiness is what you seek. Know it is waiting for you. Please - Let us help you find it today! Are you ready? Let me guide you through a better life filled with happiness & Peace. I specialise in: Crystal Ball reading, Tarot cards, Clairvoyance & Clairsentience, Soulmate love readings, Spirit Guide Channeling, Crystal Energy & Healing.

Reader.Name: Tina
Reader.Description: Tina is a Natural Psychic Clairvoyant who is also a very good Medium with around 35 years of experience. Tina can do distant healing helping you feel more yourself. Tina uses her guides and angels to help guide you and give you the answers that you are seeking regarding any situation you may be facing. Tina can also use the Pendulum, Tarot and Angel cards if requested, to give a very indepth and detailed reading. Tinas readings will leave you with a zest for life and feeling content with yourself.

Reader.Name: Joanna
Reader.Description: Joanna is a psychic clairvoyant. Joanna is a natural psychic, who was born with her ability. Joanna is also clairsentient which means she reads from the heart, and can feel peoples energies and emotions, whether they are in the same room or the other side of the world. This makes her insightful into what is going on in peoples lives, especially where matters of the heart are concerned.

Reader.Name: Caroline
Reader.Description: Caroline is a Psychic Medium,andclairvoyant Naturally gifted healer, she is also an animal healer, and an empath. Caroline is also a Qualified NLP Master practitioner, Spiritual Practitioner, CBT Therapist,hypnotherapist, past life regression therapist, Reiki & Seichem Master teacher has qualifications in herbalism and homeopathy. Soul & Spirit Magazine 2013, 2014 and 2016. Caroline channels directly from spirit, receiving messages from her guides and clients guides or loved ones passed over. Caroline was first aware of spirit in childhood. Caroline is the founder of Crystal Heart Psychics she has worked professionally as a psychic medium,& life coach for the past 20 years. To pre arrange a psychic reading with Caroline, contact us via our e mail address or message us through our facebook page. Caroline ensures all of her psychic team are empathetic and caring in the most professional manner.
